text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki and I are in the middle of tidying up
after training when we hear a voice calling from
the track.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fuji! You done trainin' for today? How 'bout
comin' back for seconds and trainin' with me a
bit?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, but I think I'll pass. Resting is an
important part of conditioning too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, aren't you confident? Don't cry to me when
we take first in the next inter-dorm scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You think you can beat Ritto Dorm? How
very interesting.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Think? I know it! And we'll use today to get a
headstart on kickin' your butt!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Would it be all right if I trained a little longer,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: In that case, there's no need for me to hold back!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I swear, she gets more heated than even
me sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, you're right. It really is best that I rest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What, you're just gonna leave me hangin'?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Resting your body is how you ensure it works at
its very best, and I'll need that to beat you at the
scrimmage!
